about.title: About
about.subtitle: VISUAL STORYTELLER
about.bio: Hi, I am Mirkazim. I am a professional videographer and content creator. I approach each project with unique creativity and professionalism, translating emotions and stories into frames.

reel.title: What will you get?
reel.description: Reels/Shorts content crafted in line with algorithms and visual trends expands your account's reach, bringing real and active followers to your profile. Emotional and professional shots raise your brand's value in the eyes of the customer, allowing you to present your service in a higher segment.
